targets.expr: sum(max by (job_id, task_name, subtask_index) (flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_column_family_rocksdb_block_cache_usage{task_name=~"$task_name", subtask_index=~"$subtask_index", job_id=~"$job_id"}))
